miniapp.name: Vibe Check
miniapp.subtitle: AI-powered vibe scoring
miniapp.description: Take a photo and get your vibe checked by our AI bot. Find out your vibe score and compete on the leaderboard with friends!
miniapp.tagline: Get your vibe checked by AI
miniapp.ogDescription: Take a photo and get your vibe checked by our AI bot. Compete on the leaderboard!
